semantic_information_gain.interpretation: A mixed baseline bucket means ordinary/nonsemantic grouping merges multiple session/prompt tags that semantic stacks keep separate.

tag_stability_smoke.generated_from: local raw session fragments; committed output is sanitized

participant_protocol.design: within-subject counterbalanced order across visualization families
participant_protocol.oracle_visibility: participants see only one assigned view condition; oracle_sources are for graders
participant_protocol.claim_gate: C5 can move beyond unsupported only after scored participant responses exist.

tasks.title: Nonsemantic Mixing
tasks.question: Find the highest-weight nonsemantic folded bucket. Report the baseline stack, total weight, semantic variant count, and top semantic variant.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: A nonsemantic folded stack can show the combined bucket, but not which session/prompt regions produced it.

tasks.title: Flat Effect Mixing
tasks.question: Find the highest-weight flat effect bucket after removing project, agent, session, and prompt frames. Report its variant count and top semantic variant.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: A flat process/effect summary can report the command/effect, but not the task regions hidden inside that bucket.

tasks.title: Heaviest Repeated Semantic Stack
tasks.question: Identify the heaviest semantic system stack and report its session tag, prompt tag, command, effect, and weight.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: A trace tree requires scanning many occurrences; the folded stack turns repeated behavior into one weighted answer.

tasks.title: Top Agent-Difference Diagnostic
tasks.question: In the top-level cohort, identify the largest normalized Codex-vs-Claude behavioral difference and report the winner, delta per 1000 observations, and normalized stack.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: Raw per-agent counts are confounded by total volume; this view normalizes stacks before presenting the diagnostic.

tasks.title: Largest Token Region
tasks.question: Identify the largest token stack and report the session tag, prompt tag, model, token kind, and weight.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: A token dashboard can show aggregate cost, but this task asks for the semantic region and provenance kind of the largest token mass.

tasks.title: Tag Stability Boundary
tasks.question: Decide whether the current tag stability smoke proves semantic adequacy. Report the smoke verdict, llama repeated-run stability, fallback-vs-llama exact match, and the correct conclusion.

scoring.method: exact field match against oracle unless the field is marked explanatory

tasks.baseline_contrast: This task checks that users do not over-read stability smoke as semantic adequacy evidence.

effect_lineage_smoke.claim_boundary: checker evidence only; live exact capture over real sessions is still missing

claim_gates.oracle: system folded total exceeds unique stacks and repeated stacks exist

claim_gates.claim: C2 one-word tags in stack grammar
claim_gates.oracle: all committed tags match the one-word grammar and vocabulary is non-trivial

claim_gates.claim: C3 semantic stacks add information beyond flat/nonsemantic baselines
claim_gates.oracle: baseline buckets mix multiple session/prompt tags that semantic stacks separate
observational, unpaired source cohorts exist; no causal benchmark claim

claim_gates.claim: C5 user utility over trace tree/process logs
claim_gates.oracle: requires scored participant responses with time, accuracy, false positives, and confidence

claim_gates.claim: C6 exact AgentSight effect stream preserves value
claim_gates.oracle: requires live AgentSight exact effects from real sessions to pass lineage checker
claim_gates.evidence: effect_lineage_smoke=fixture_lineage_smoke_passed source=fixture effect_events=4 join_rate_pct=100.0 orphans=0 orphan_reasons={} live_exact_capture=missing

claim_gates.oracle: smoke checks repeated-run syntax/stability; human adequacy remains required
claim_gates.evidence: same_hash_multi_tag_count=0 smoke_verdict=smoke_supported fallback_stable_pct=100.0 fallback_generic_pct=8.333 llama_stable_pct=100.0 llama_generic_pct=20.833 fallback_vs_llama_exact_pct=0.0
